Volume of Cylinder Calculator

Calculate the volume and surface area of a cylinder. Enter the radius and height to get instant results.

FAQ

What is the formula for volume of a cylinder?

Volume = π × r² × h, where r is the radius and h is the height.

How do I calculate surface area of a cylinder?

Total surface area = 2πr² + 2πrh (two circular bases + lateral surface).

What is lateral area?

Lateral area = 2πrh. It's the area of the curved surface only, excluding the top and bottom circles.
